name: Ghostrick Fairy
name_jp: ゴーストリックの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned, unless you control a "Ghostrick" monster. Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ghostrick" card in your GY; Set that card (but banish it when it leaves the field), then, you can change face-up monsters your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position, up to the number of Set cards you control.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned, unless you control a "Ghostrick" monster. Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ghostrick" card in your GY; Set that card (but banish it when it leaves the field), then, you can change face-up monsters your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position, up to the number of Set cards you control.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned, unless you control a "Ghostrick" monster. Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ghostrick" card in your GY; Set that card (but banish it when it leaves the field), then, you can change face-up monsters your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position, up to the number of Set cards you control.

banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
